race.description: Linda Daffy's Mermaid Waters Tab Hcp (C2)
race.comment: CAT CALL (14) couldn't have been more impressive when saluting by over five lengths at the Gold Coast last time out and will have taken a lot from that dominant victory. Will be rock-hard fit for this and can go back-to-back. DIALIDAE (9) returned in good order with a close-up second over this course and distance and should get a gun run from gate three. Should be right there at the business end. CIPHERTEXT (8) is yet to miss a place in six starts over this track and trip and rarely puts in a poor one. Has to be included. THE ROOKIE (11) best of the rest coming off a good return second. Sharper for that.
